commands.review_summary:
The branch constrains `openclaw doctor --fix` legacy plugin dependency cleanup with target-kind filtering, parent-segment and symlink checks, realpath containment, and regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main collects env/plugin-derived cleanup targets and recursively removes them, while the PR tests cover escaped paths and symlink roots. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
